name: reading-pipeline
description: Research topics, summarize papers, convert documents to EPUB or KEPUB, and send them to a Kobo or reMarkable via Google Drive.

interface.shortDescription: Research, summarize, convert, and send reading
interface.longDescription: Create literature-grounded topic reports, summarize academic papers, convert documents and conversation content to EPUB or KEPUB, and upload files to Google Drive folders that sync with Kobo and reMarkable devices.
defaultPrompt: Research this topic and create a course-level report.
Send this file to my e-reader.
